title: Fix node has no type on new with randomize

features.name: new expression without parentheses in type-assigned variable
features.description: Code should include a variable declaration with type assignment using the 'new' expression without parentheses, where the type is a class or typedef

features.name: randomize method call on variable after new
features.description: Code should include a randomize() method call invoked on a variable that was assigned using the new expression

features.name: static function returning class type with local variable
features.description: Code should include a static class function that returns a class type and uses a local variable declaration with constructor call
